title: Database Persistence - Save quiz results, progress, and attestations to PostgreSQL
description: Connect existing training UI to PostgreSQL. Schema exists in packages/database/src/schema.ts. Add API routes for user sync, quiz sessions, progress tracking, attestations, and audit logging. See openspec/changes/database-persistence/proposal.md for full spec.

title: Cloud Run Deployment - Dockerfile and cloudbuild.yaml
description: Create production deployment config for GCP Cloud Run. Multi-stage Dockerfile with Bun, cloudbuild.yaml for CI/CD, health check endpoint, Secret Manager integration. See openspec/changes/cloud-run-deployment/proposal.md for full spec.

title: Expand Question Bank - From 50 to 250 questions
description: Expand from 50 questions (10/module) to 250 questions (50/module). Question types: 60% multiple_choice, 15% true_false, 15% select_all, 10% scenario. All questions sourced from training materials with citations. See openspec/changes/expand-questions/proposal.md for full spec.

title: Admin Dashboard - User management and compliance reports
description: Build admin dashboard at /admin/* routes. Features: user list with progress, individual user detail view, dashboard stats, compliance reports. Role-guarded for admin users only. See openspec/changes/admin-dashboard/proposal.md for full spec.

title: Admin Dashboard - User management and compliance reports
description: Build admin dashboard at /admin/* routes. Features: user list with progress, individual user detail view, dashboard stats, compliance reports. Role-guarded for admin users only. Depends on database-persistence. See openspec/changes/admin-dashboard/proposal.md for full spec.
